languages.text: "Я рад{mf||а}, что с этим покончено. Надеюсь, мы более никогда не встретимся".

traits.locale_text: "Я рад{mf||а}, что с этим покончено. Надеюсь, мы более никогда не встретимся".

languages.text: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."
languages.original_text: "Я рад{mf||а}, что с этим покончено. Надеюсь, мы более никогда не встретимся".

traits.locale_text: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."
"I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."
"I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."

languages.text: “我很高兴这事彻底结束了。但愿我们永不再见。”
languages.original_text: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."

traits.locale_text: “我很高兴这事彻底结束了。但愿我们永不再见。”

languages.text: «Me alegro de haber terminado esto. Espero que no volvamos a vernos».
languages.original_text: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."

traits.locale_text: «Me alegro de haber terminado esto. Espero que no volvamos a vernos».

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|ravi|ravie} d'en avoir terminé. J'espère que nous ne nous reverrons plus. »
languages.original_text: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|ravi|ravie} d'en avoir terminé. J'espère que nous ne nous reverrons plus. »

languages.text: "Bu işin bitmesinden memnunum. Umarım bir daha hiç karşılaşmayız."
languages.original_text: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."

traits.locale_text: "Bu işin bitmesinden memnunum. Umarım bir daha hiç karşılaşmayız."

languages.text: "Ich bin froh, dass es vorbei ist. Ich hoffe, wir sehen uns nie wieder."
languages.original_text: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin froh, dass es vorbei ist. Ich hoffe, wir sehen uns nie wieder."

languages.text: 「これで終わりよかった。二度と会わないでほしい」
languages.original_text: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."

traits.locale_text: 「これで終わりよかった。二度と会わないでほしい」
